calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge
Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn,
Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Robert Ted Parker, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff 33 COLLECTION, LLC; 33 BASEBALL FOUNDATION,
and MARK B. ROBERTS.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants JOHN ROGERS, SPORTS CARDS PLUS INC. DBA THE
ROGERS PHOTO ARCHIVE, A CORPORATION ORGANIZED IN ARKANSAS; AND DIGITAL STOCK PLANET LLC DBA
ARGENTA IMAGES, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY; PLANET GIANT LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY
COMPANY ORGANIZED in DELAWARE.
Witnesses, Mark Roberts, Rhys Yeakley, and Thomas Enos, sworn and examined on behalf of the
Plaintiffs.
Court ordered Defendants Does I-XX dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Amended Complaint for Damages and Injunctive Relief Alleging Intentional Fraud, Negligent Misrepresentation, Breach of Warranty, Mutual Mistake, Consumer Fraud and Unfair Competition filed 6/27/2014
2-Copies of payments sent and photos
3-Email exchanges between Plaintiff and Defendant
4-APPENDIX A TO COMPLAINT (same as 11)
5-Amended Chadwick partial return agreement
6-Copy of letter sent re: default of Amended Chadwick partial return agreement
7-FBI agent Bruce Brusokas agent in charge of investigation re: memorabilia authenticity
8-Article about FBI Raid
9-Spreadsheet of details re: problems with Memorabilia Authenticity
11-APPENDIX A, list of transactions between Plaintiff and Defendant, attached TO COMPLAINT
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff MARK B. ROBERTS only and against Defendant JOHN ROGERS, SPORTS CARDS PLUS INC. DBA THE ROGERS PHOTO ARCHIVE, A CORPORATION ORGANIZED IN ARKANSAS; AND DIGITAL STOCK PLANET LLC DBA ARGENTA IMAGES, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY; PLANET GIANT LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ORGANIZED in DELAWARE, as follows:

Principal $1,749,637.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $34,000.00
Costs $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,783,637.00

Injunctive Relief Forbidding any of the Defendants to sell or advertise for sale any false or fraudulent article of sports merchandise within the State of California.

Judgment signed in open court.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT TED PARKER OF THE PARKER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (925) 254-8011 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAEMIN CHANG OF FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. 364-5551 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JOHN ROGERS, SPORTS CARDS PLUS INC., DIGITAL STOCK PLANET LLC DBA ARGENT IMAGES and PLANET GIANT LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. None of Plaintiffs' causes of action are clearly barred by the statute of limitations on the face of the Complaint. Plaintiffs allege discovery on January 30, 2014. Whether Plaintiffs should have discovered this earlier involves a question of fact that is not the proper subject of a demurrer. For the third cause of action, Plaintiffs assert a claim for breach of the implied warranty of fitness. (Complaint, 27.) Whether the underlying contract was written, oral or implied in conduct is not germane to this cause of action. For the fifth cause of action, although injunctive relief is a remedy, "the phrase 'cause of action' is also 'commonly used in pleading as applying only to the relief sought . . . ." (McDowell v. Watson (1997) 59 Cal.App.4th 1155, 1159-1160.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT TED PARKER OF THE PARKER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (925) 254-8011 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAEMIN CHANG OF FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. 364-5551 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JOHN ROGERS, SPORTS CARDS PLUS INC., DIGITAL STOCK PLANET LLC DBA ARGENT IMAGES AND PLANET GIANT LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Granted, with 10 days leave to amend. For punitive damages, Plaintiff's fraud allegations are conclusory, and not specially pled. (See Civ. Code 3294(c).) For attorney fees, Plaintiffs have neither pled any facts nor cited the statutory bases upon which they seek attorney fees. CCP 1021.4 is not applicable to this action; Plaintiffs admit that Defendants have not been convicted of any felony offense. (See Opp., p. 3:21-24.) Plaintiffs have not pled any facts to support an attorney fees pursuant to CCP 1021.5. Plaintiffs are granted leave to amend, if they can do so in good faith, to allege a prayer for punitive damages and attorney fees.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
